description: BC kind/side matcher (§9.2). A discretization rule authored with the natural BC vocabulary — `kind`/`side` keys on the synthetic `bc` node (as in ESD dirichlet_bc.json) — must match: `kind` is exposed as the `fn` match field (literal 'dirichlet') and `side` as the `dim` field ($side binds to the boundary side). Mirrors the ESD dirichlet ghost rule u_ghost = 2*u_bc - u[0] (boundary value carried symbolically as `g` to keep the golden free of constant-folding ambiguity). Before the kind/side parse extension (ess-tox/G8) the BC pattern matched any bc node regardless of kind/side; this fixture pins that it now fires and binds $u, $value, and $side correctly.
